organization.name: OctopusGarage
organization.description: Small, practical open-source tools for AI agents, local automation, private knowledge, networking, and browser-native products.

projects.name: tmux-claude-bot
projects.description: Control Claude Code and Codex agents from Telegram, Feishu/Lark, a CLI, or a TUI.

projects.name: alcove
projects.description: Local-first personal memory for agent workflows.

projects.name: clipsmith
projects.description: Capture posts, articles, media, and OCR into portable local bundles.

projects.name: git-auto-sync
projects.description: Auto-sync local repositories with AI-assisted commits, scheduling, and notifications.

projects.name: net-auto-switch
projects.description: Keep macOS WiFi and Clash Verge proxy nodes healthy with measured network checks.

projects.name: envsentinel
projects.description: Audit local environment signals for AI coding CLIs.

projects.name: mesh-talk
projects.description: Serverless, end-to-end-encrypted P2P messenger for local networks.

projects.name: bracket-guess
projects.description: Predict knockout brackets and export polished shareable posters in the browser.

projects.name: mbti-lab
projects.description: Bilingual MBTI personality test with offline support and shareable results.

projects.name: octopusgarage-skills
projects.description: Reusable Claude Code and Codex skills for OctopusGarage workflows.

projects.name: english-pilot
projects.description: English conversation gate, coaching assistant, and review system for AI workflows.

projects.name: telegram-bridge
projects.description: Bridge Telegram messages into tmux and stream pane output back to chat.
